description: You are an IT technician preparing a ruggedized field laptop for a marine biology expedition to the Galapagos Islands. Reconfigure GPredict for the researchers by replacing the default 'Amateur' module with a new module named 'Argos_Tracking'. This module must contain the following satellites: NOAA 15 (25338), NOAA 18 (28654), NOAA 19 (33591), METOP-B (38771), and METOP-C (43689). Establish two ground stations: 'Galapagos_Base' (0.7402 S, 90.3138 W, 15m altitude) and 'Ascension_Island' (7.9467 S
